# run()

**Instance Method**

Creates a test run instance and starts the test.

## Declaration

```swift
func run()
```

## Discussion

Creates an instance of the class that [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTest/testRunClass] specifies, and passes it as a parameter to the [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTest/perform(_:)] method.

## Running Tests

- **perform(_:)**: Executes a specific test.
title: run()
